mapper.select:
SELECT i.listen_id, i.listen_type, i.listen_type_id, i.content_title, i.last_listen_dtime, i.album_id, i.title, i.release_ymd, i.album_type, i.albumArtistId, i.albumArtistName, j.album_img_size as size, j.album_img_url as url FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.title as content_title, a.last_listen_dtime, b.album_id, b.title, b.release_ymd, b.album_tp as album_type, d.artist_id albumArtistId, d.artist_nm albumArtistName, c.listorder FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type = 'ALBUM' ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN ted_album b ON a.listen_type_id = b.album_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_albumartist c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_albumstyle f ON b.album_id = f.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_style g ON f.style_id = g.style_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON h.artist_id = b.artist_id GROUP BY listen_id, listen_type, listen_type_id, content_title, last_listen_dtime, album_id, title, release_ymd, album_type, albumArtistId, albumArtistName, listorder ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC, listorder ASC ) i
LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img j ON i.album_id = j.album_id
